name: loadSound
description: Loads an audio file from disk and associates it with a unique identifier. Supported formats depend on the system's multimedia backend (typically MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC). If the ID already exists, the old sound is replaced.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Path to the audio file. Absolute path is recommended, or a path relative to Stellarium's working directory.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the sound object (e.g., 'background_music', 'alert_sound').

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect. Audio format support varies by platform.

name: playSound
description: Plays a previously loaded sound. If the sound is already playing, it restarts from the beginning. If the sound was paused, it resumes playback.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sound to play.

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect.

name: pauseSound
description: Pauses the playback of a sound. The sound can be resumed later with `playSound()`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sound to pause.

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect.

name: stopSound
description: Stops the playback of a sound completely. When `playSound()` is called next, the sound will restart from the beginning.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sound to stop.

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect.

name: dropSound
description: Unloads a sound from memory and releases its resources. The sound can no longer be played unless it is loaded again with `loadSound()`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sound to remove.

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect.

name: position
description: Returns the current playback position of a sound in milliseconds. Returns `-1` if the sound is not loaded or the position cannot be determined.
returnDescription: Current position in milliseconds, or -1 on error.

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect.

name: duration
description: Returns the total duration of a sound in milliseconds. **Note:** The duration may only be available after playback has started (e.g., call it a second after `playSound()`). Returns `0` if unknown, or `-1` if the duration cannot be determined.
returnDescription: Total duration in milliseconds, 0 if unknown, -1 on error.

compatibility.notes: ⚠️ Requires Qt Multimedia module. If Stellarium was built without media support, these functions will have no effect. Duration may be unknown until playback starts.
